J0600A Pain Intensity Numeric Rating Scale Number CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's numeric pain rating value over the last five days on a zero to ten scale. 0 Minimum
10 Maximum
99 Unable to answer
- Not assessed/no information
^ Blank (skip pattern)
342 J0600B_VRBL_DSCRPTR_SCALE_NUM J0600B_VRBL_DSCRPTR_SCALE_NUM J0600B Pain Intensity Verbal Descriptor Scale Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's intensity of worst pain experienced in the last five
